_comment: Quiet summer day — VIX at 12.68 against a calm declining window. Exercises the noise-zone axis: severity should be near zero, guarding against score inflation that would trigger false composite signals downstream.

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: Noise-zone guard. VIX 12.68 against window mean 14.41 (std=1.23) gives z=-1.41, severity ~0.07. Band [0.00, 0.10] is deliberately tight at the low end — if this scores above 0.10, something is inflating noise into signal. z=-1.41 is a mild decline (VIX drifting down in calm summer), not a tradeable event. Any downstream composite that fires on this is a false positive bleeding theta.
